overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a snowy medieval village at blue hour, approaching and entering a large gothic cathedral with illuminated stained glass windows. The atmosphere is cold and atmospheric with falling snow outside and warm candlelight inside the stone church.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy alley between medieval stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow snow-covered alley toward distant illuminated cathedral tower

entered.detail: medieval stone building with snow-covered wooden roof
tall stone wall with rough texture forming alley boundary
tall gothic tower with pointed spire visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alley between stone buildings in a snowy medieval village. The path is covered in snow and the sky is a deep blue dusk color. A tall gothic cathedral tower is visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of cathedral entrance

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza revealing full cathedral facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the cathedral entrance across the snowy plaza, passing a stone statue

entered.detail: large gothic cathedral with pointed arches and tall stained glass windows
tall stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
large wooden arched doorway with steps leading up
warmly lit windows glowing orange against the blue dusk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza in front of the cathedral. The character walks across snow-covered ground toward the entrance, passing a stone statue. The gothic facade dominates the view with its tall spire and warmly lit windows glowing against the blue hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral main nave with central stained glass

events.description: enters cathedral through large wooden doors into candlelit interior
interior illuminated by warm hanging lanterns and stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance into the grand nave, approaching the altar

entered.detail: large colorful stained glass window with green and blue figures above the altar
rows of dark wooden church benches lining the nave
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm orange light
raised platform with red carpet leading to the central window

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cathedral interior, transitioning from cold blue exterior to warm candlelit space. The nave features tall stone pillars, wooden pews, and a magnificent stained glass window at the far end. Hanging lanterns provide warm illumination as the character walks down the central aisle toward the altar.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral side nave with stained glass windows

events.description: turns left to examine side stained glass windows along the nave

agents.ego_description: walking along the side aisle observing detailed stained glass windows including one depicting Arkay

entered.detail: red and gold stained glass window depicting a robed figure labeled Arkay
blue stained glass window with figure in blue robes
narrow passage between outer wall and row of columns

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to explore the side nave, walking past detailed stained glass windows depicting various figures. The camera moves along the stone columns, revealing windows with vibrant red and blue colors, including one labeled Arkay. The warm lantern light continues to illuminate the stone interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, snowy medieval alleyway into the warm, candlelit sanctuary of a gothic cathedral. It begins by following a character through a narrow stone passage under a deep blue dusk sky, with a distant cathedral tower framing the path ahead. As the alley opens into a wide plaza, the camera moves across the snow-covered ground past a stone statue toward the towering facade and its glowing windows. The scene then shifts from the chilly exterior to the interior nave, where the lighting transforms from blue to gold as the character walks past stone pillars and wooden pews toward a magnificent stained glass window. Finally, the camera turns left to explore the side nave, gliding along the columns to reveal vibrant red and blue glass depictions of figures, including one of Arkay, under the soft glow of hanging lanterns.
